note: Data-crack correction at the artificial WEST domain edge (139.60): the TAMA RIVER crosses the edge around lat 35.58-35.66; its upstream in-domain band is below the resolve width (policy-filled), and the leftover slivers pinned between the fill and the artificial edge meshed as 2.6-17 deg sliver cells (runs 6186561/6186667). Force the whole edge band to land; the sample-meshed lower Tama (downstream of ~139.68) is unaffected.
